hero.title: Master the SAT.
hero.description: ERDEM PLUS combines intelligent self-paced learning with real 1-on-1 expert counseling — so you get the flexibility of an app and the results of a private tutor.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to your
howItWorks.subtitle: ERDEM+ turns a complex journey into a clear, structured path — with technology that adapts and humans who care.

steps.title: Study at Your Pace
steps.description: Access adaptive video lessons and reading materials designed to meet you exactly where you are. Learn anytime, anywhere.

steps.title: Practice & Improve
steps.description: Take full-length adaptive practice tests that pinpoint your weaknesses. Our AI engine adjusts difficulty in real time.

steps.title: Get Expert Coached
steps.description: Book 1-on-1 live sessions with top counselors. Get personalized strategy, test-taking techniques, and accountability.

items.title: Adaptive Practice Tests
items.description: Full-length SAT simulations that adjust to your skill level, targeting the exact areas you need most.

items.title: AI Progress Tracking
items.description: Intelligent analytics that map your learning curve, predict your score, and surface your next best study action.

items.title: 1-on-1 Live Counseling
items.description: Direct sessions with certified counselors who know the SAT inside out — your questions, answered live.

items.title: Personalized Study Plans
items.description: AI-generated weekly study plans tailored to your test date, target score, and current performance.

items.title: Score Analytics Dashboard
items.description: A beautiful, clear view of your progress across all SAT domains — know exactly where you stand.

counselors.title: Counselors who
counselors.subtitle: Every ERDEM+ counselor has deep expertise in their section — not generalists, but specialists who've helped thousands of students break through.

items.name: Ylalt Naranbaatar
items.bio: ERDEM+'s lead counselor. Has personally guided 100+ students to their target scores through tailored strategy, deep diagnostic work, and relentless support.

items.name: Aiden Park
items.text: I had tried three other prep courses and never broke 1100. ERDEM+ was completely different — the AI actually found the gaps in my reasoning, not just my wrong answers. My counselor, Dr. Moreno, changed how I think about math.

items.name: Sofia Reyes
items.text: The 1-on-1 sessions were worth every penny. James helped me go from dreading the reading section to actually enjoying it. Having a real expert who knows my exact weak spots is something no app can replace.

items.name: Marcus Chen
items.text: The adaptive tests are eerily accurate — within two weeks they already knew I struggled with paired passages more than vocabulary. Scored a 1510 on test day, 390 points above where I started. Genuinely life-changing.

waitlist.title: Be the first to transform
waitlist.subtitle: Get priority access to ERDEM+, exclusive launch pricing, and a free introductory counseling session when we launch.
waitlist.noSpam: No spam. We'll notify you at launch with your early access link.
waitlist.errorDuplicate: This email is already on the waitlist.
waitlist.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlist.successBody: We'll reach out to {email} as soon as we launch. Expect early access, exclusive pricing, and a free counseling session.

enroll.headline: Apply to ERDEM+
enroll.testDateHelper: Don't know your test date yet? No problem — you can set this later.
enroll.successBody: Thank you, {firstName}! We've received your enrollment request for {program}.
enroll.paymentContactNote: Once you complete the payment, our team will contact you within 24 hours.
enroll.paymentPhoneNote: Want to talk to us first? Call
enroll.errorDuplicate: An enrollment request with this email is already pending.
enroll.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
enroll.errorFutureDate: Test date must be in the future.
enroll.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

cta.title: Start your SAT
cta.subtitle: Join students who are transforming their SAT scores with personalized learning and expert guidance.

brand.description: The SAT learning platform that pairs intelligent technology with human expertise.
